payload.answer: The new memory appears to supersede the existing memory: the existing memory says Sam currently works at Goldman, while the new memory says Sam left Goldman and joined Point72. Safe actions available: approve_supersession to treat the new memory as replacing the old current-job fact; keep_both if both should remain because they may refer to different Sams, different times, or require ambiguity; reject_new if the new statement should not be stored; edit if the wording needs correction before saving.
